title: HTTP Request tool fails with ENOTFOUND error
symptom: The HTTP Request tool fails to connect, resulting in a 'getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND' error. The workflow execution stops abruptly, preventing further actions.
applies_when: Workflow is initiated by a user via a webhook
not_this_if: Error handling is properly configured to continue execution
root_cause: The error occurs when the HTTP Request tool attempts to connect to a domain that cannot be resolved. This typically indicates that the domain name is incorrect or the server is unreachable, leading to a failure in the workflow execution.
fix_steps: Move the HTTP Request tool into a sub-workflow.
Use a node to call the sub-workflow with the setting 'On error': 'Continue'.
Ensure that the main workflow can handle the error output from the sub-workflow.
agent_instruction: Implement a sub-workflow for the HTTP Request tool and configure error handling to continue execution.
